title: 'If we die, we die together': Wife of man nearly sucked out of Ryanair plane speaks of ordeal
summary_full: Svetlana Grković told Serbian media that her husband is "seriously injured and in shock".
summary_public: Svetlana Grković told Serbian media that her husband is "seriously injured and in shock".
